## Manager's Message

“At Lahore Leads University, we believe that every student has the potential to achieve something extraordinary. Our world-class faculty, innovative programs, and supportive community are here to empower you to turn your passion into a successful career.

We invite you to join us and take the first step toward a bright and fulfilling future. Whether you’re just beginning your academic journey or looking to take it to the next level, Lahore Leads University is the place where ambition meets opportunity.

Let’s build your future—together.”

**## Admission Procedure**

**On receipt of Admission Application Form by the Admissions Office.**

**A student shall be enrolled provisionally in a program, with a roll number, in order to facilitate his/her immediate attendance in the class.**

**However, it shall be mandatory for him/her to get verification / validation of his/her earlier educational documents attested by the Inter-Boards Committee of Chairmen (IBCC) / the Higher Education Commission (HEC) as applicable and,**

**As well, meet other entry requirements in the program,**

**In order to get regular registration by the University**

**### **Online Admission Guidelines****

**Lahore Leads University offers admissions twice a year in Fall and Spring semesters.**

**Law, Pharmacy, and Engineering programs are offered only in the Fall semester.**

**Step 1- Visit the online admission link and register to access the application form.**

**Step 2-Fill the admission form carefully with correct personal and academic information.**

**Step 3- An Admission Counselor contacts the applicant for further admission guidance.**

**Step 4-Pay the admission fee online using the challan issued by the counselor.**

**Step 5-Upload required documents and submit the application.**

**The student receives the provisional admission slip from the university**

**.**

**- For further assistance please contact: 042-35927413-15, 0304-1111550**
**- For any queries you can email at: admission@leads.edu.pk**

**![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/pic11.jpeg)**

**![newm mew](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/newm-mew.webp)**

****On Campus Admission Guidelines****

**Lahore Leads University offers admissions twice a year, in the Fall and Spring semesters. However, programs in Law, Pharmacy, and Engineering are only offered for admission in the Fall semester.**

**Students who want to apply can visit the university campus or check the official website to get detailed information about available programs and the admission procedure.**

**Step 1-Visit the admission office located at Kamahan Road, DHA Phase 5, Lahore.**

**Step 2- Meet the admission counselors to get guidance and information about programs and requirements.**

**Step 3- Obtain the prospectus from the Accounts Section in the admission office.**

**Step 4- Submit the admission fee, required documents, and the first installment of the tuition fee.**

**Step 5- After completing these steps, the university will issue the first slip for provisional admission.**

**- For further assistance please contact: 042-35927413-15, 0304-1111550**
**- For any queries you can email at: admission@leads.edu.pk**

**### Degree Requirements**

**##### (1) Enrolment / Registration in the Four Year BS/Bachelor (Honors) Degree Program**

**(i) Intermediate with 12 years of education in any desipline shall be considered for enrolment in Four Years BS/Bachelor (Honors) Degree Program under the semester system.**

**(ii) Two year Bachelor Degree (Conventional BA/B.Sc./etc) holders shall be considered for enrolment in a Four Year BS/Bachelor (Honors) Degree Program under the semester system and the candidate may get benefit of maximum 50 credits hours for the Two year Bachelor Degree, as may be determined by the Equivalence Committee.**

**(iii) The candidate, as referred to in Para (ii) above in this clause, shall produce a transcript/detailed marks certificate for consideration by the Equivalence Committee as documentary support in order to achieve benefit that may be granted on course to course basis provided that such a course is appropriate to the scheme of studies of the program to which the candidate is seeking admission.**

**(iv) The remaining credit hours, out of the prescribed credit hours by the University, shall be completed by the student so enrolled provided that at least 60% of the course work shall be completed in residence (as full time regular student of this University).**

**(v) The core courses of the Majors shall be completed by the student so enrolled, as prescribed by the University.**

**(vi) The student so enrolled shall also be required to pass the Bridge Courses as may be prescribed by the University, in order to fill the gap presently exists in the two year BA/B.Sc./etc. (Conventional/Pass Course) program and the four year BS/Bachelors (Honors) program.**

**##### (2) Enrolment/Registration in the Graduate/Two Years M.Phli (Conventional) Degree Program:**

**(i) 16 years Degree (Conventional Masters/BS Honors,etc) holders shall be considered for enrolment in a Two Years M.Phli (Conventional) Degree Program under the semester system subject to fulfillment of other entry requirements.**

**(ii) The candidate shall produce transcripts/detailed marks certificates for consideration of admission in order to determine the eligibility of a candidate for admission to a program.**

**(iii) The student so enrolled shall also be required to pass the GAT General/University test as may be prescribed by the University, in order to full fill the eligibllity critrion to enter to a program.**

**### How To Apply Online**

**For online admissions, the procedure is quite simple! Here is how to do it:**

**Step 1: First, visit our website via this link: [https://apply.leads.edu.pk/](https://apply.leads.edu.pk/) and you will see this page.**

**OR  Click on ‘Apply Now’, which you can find on the top left corner. The page shown below will appear. Fill in all the relevant information.**

**![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/apply-1.png)**

**Step2: Next, you will be directed to the main application form where you will fill in your particulars and other information (i.e. your previous education etc.)**

**![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/apply-2.png)**

**Step 3: After the ‘profile’ section of the form has been filled, you will be able to proceed to General Documents and Academics section. Here, you will need to upload pictures of your documents.**

**![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/apply-3.png)**

**Step 4: After uploading all the required documents, just click on Submit Application, and you’re good to go! You’ll see the page pictured below; a form number will be provided to you. You will also be able to download the challan form, and once the dues are paid, your admission will be confirmed.**

**![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/apply-4.png)**

**Step 5: After the above steps, an admission officer will reach out to you to answer any queries you might have, or you can contact us yourself at this number: 0304-1111552**

**Let’s go through the process of walk-in admission. It’s really quite simple as well. Here we go:**

**Step 1: First, you will have to visit the Admission Office at Lahore Leads University.**

**Step 2: One of our admission officers will guide you through the whole procedure, and all the impertinent information relating to admission will be provided to you.**

**Step 3: Next, you will have to acquire an admission form and fill it out with your particulars, and other required information such as your previous education and your contact information. We also advise you to bring along copies of your original documents, CNIC or B-Form and passport-sized photographs so that they can be submitted alongside the admission form.**

**Step 4: Once the form has been filled out, it will be submitted to our admission officer, and they will provide you with a fee challan.**

**Step 5: Once the fee challan has been paid, your provisional admission at Lahore Leads University will be completed.**

**### Transfer policy**

**##### TRANSFER OF CREDITS FOR UNDERGRADUATE AND GRADUATE PROGRAMS**

****A.** At least sixty (60) per cent of the total credits (required for award of an Undergraduate or Graduate degree) shall be earned with Full Residency Status at Lahore Leads University, provided that other requirements for the award of degree are fulfilled.**

****B.** Request for transfer of credit(s) in a course shall **not** be entertained if the grade is less than **C** for an undergraduate program, and if the grade is less than **B** for a graduate program. However, the transferred credits shall only meet the credit hours (of course work) requirement and shall not be included in calculation of the CGPA earned in full residency status at The Lahore Leads University.**

****C.** If there is a course with different title but the curriculum common to a course at Leads University the credit hours may be transferred at the recommendation of the Equivalence Committee of the Lahore Leads University.**

****D.** Subject to provisions of Para A, Para B and Para C above of this Clause 17, the Equivalence Committee, constituted under The LLU Regulation No. 2 of 2012 (promulgated on 19th May 2012 by the Board of Governors), shall consider and decide about the transfer of Credits as prescribed.**

****E.** The transferred / exempted credits, as referred to above, shall only be considered for fulfillment of the program’s credit hours requirement and in no way shall be included in calculation of the CGPA.**

**![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/ADMISSIONS-PAGE-SCHOLARSHIPS.png)**

**## Scholarship**

**At Lahore Leads University (LLU), we believe that financial constraints should never stand in the way of ambition and talent. We are committed to making quality higher education accessible by offering comprehensive financial assistance to deserving students.**

**Invest in your future without the financial worry. Contact our Admissions Office today to learn more about the eligibility criteria and secure your scholarship!**

**### Merit Scholarship**

**##### Merit Scholarship for First Semester Students**

**1.1 The university will award merit scholarship (in the form of 75% tuition fee waiver) to top 5% students admitted in the first semester of each program on the basis of merit determined at the time of admission.**

**1.2 Any student who gets admission after the due date of fee deposit / scheduled test date / commencement of the semester, shall not be entitled to get merit scholarship in the first semester.**

**1.3 Students falling under clause 1.2 will be allowed to compete for merit scholarship in the subsequent semesters.**

**1.4 A student who changes the program of study will not be entitled for merit scholarship in the first semester.**

**1.5 In addition, fee waivers to position holders of BISE examination / Diploma holders are admissible in the first semester as follows:**

**- 100% tuition fee waiver to first position holder**
**- 75% tuition fee waiver to second position holder**
**- 50% tuition fee waiver to third position holder**

**1.6 Tuition fee waivers are also allowed in the first semester to the students admitted on A-level basis.**

**Three A’s in A-Level 50%tuition fee waiver**

**Two A’s in A-Level 25%tuition fee waiver**

**1.7 This award is only for the first semester. For subsequent semesters, the students would have to compete according to following scheme.**

**### Need base scholarship**

**##### Need Base Scholarship**

**The university is providing fee concession to needy students. Such concessions are to be decided on case-to-case basis. Students would be required to apply for need-based scholarship in prescribed format. Following information would be required.**

**- Family income**
**- Parents alive or deceased**
**- Number of siblings**
**- Residential locality**
**- House owned or rented, covered area**
**- Family utilities bills and**
**- Type of vehicle(s) owned by the family**

**### Transfer policy**

**##### Fee Concession**

**The LLU allows fee concession to siblings who are enrolled in the university. Such concession is granted as per following scheme:**

**4.1 If two siblings are studying in LLU then**

**- One will get 50% fee concession**
**- One will pay full fee**

**If three siblings are studying in LLU then**

**- One will get 100% fee concession**
**- Two will pay full fee**

**If four siblings are studying in LLU then**

**- One will get 100% fee concession**
**- One will get 50% fee concession**
**- Two will pay full fee**

**If five siblings are studying in LLU then**

**- Two will get 100% fee concession**
**- Three will pay full fee**

**4.2 The sibling getting brother/sister concession, cannot apply for need base fee concession. However the siblings not getting this concession can be granted, at the most, 50% fee concession if they deserve this on the basis of need.**

**4.3 Fee concession will be granted to those siblings who are expected to complete their programs of studies earlier.**

**4.4 If the brother/sister who is expected to complete his/her study program earlier as per schedule of studies, is getting merit scholarship, then the other sibling will avail the brother/sister concession.**

**4.5 A student can avail only one form of financial assistance at one time.**

**### Alumni Based Scholarships**

**loyalty and legacy of our graduates.**

**- **Eligibility:** This scholarship is designed for our proud alumni who wish to return to LLU for higher degrees (such as moving from a BS to an MS/MPhil program), as well as the immediate family members of our alumni.**

**- **Purpose:** To foster a lifelong learning community and reward the continued trust placed in Lahore Leads University.**


**### Shohda E Pakistan**

**We owe an unpayable debt to the brave heroes who have laid down their lives for the defense and security of our country.**

**- **Eligibility:** This scholarship is a tribute to the martyrs (Shohda) of Pakistan’s Armed Forces, Police, and other law enforcement agencies. It provides significant financial assistance to their direct dependents (children/spouses).**

**- **Purpose:** To ensure the families of our national heroes receive the highest standard of education without financial worry.**


**### Gilgit Baltistan Scholarships**

**Recognizing the immense talent and potential of students from Pakistan’s northern regions, we have established a dedicated scholarship quota for Gilgit-Baltistan.**

**- **Eligibility:** Available to prospective students holding a valid Gilgit-Baltistan domicile.**

**- **Purpose:** To encourage brilliant minds from the north to join LLU’s diverse campus and access modern academic and research facilities.**


**### Fata Scholarships**

**LLU believes in empowering the youth of historically underrepresented areas by providing them with access to top-tier higher education in Lahore.**

**- **Eligibility:** Dedicated entirely to students holding a domicile from the erstwhile Federally Administered Tribal Areas (merged districts).**

**- **Purpose:** To bridge the educational divide and help students from these regions transform their ambitions into leadership.**


**### MoU with Punjab Police Scholarships**

**As part of our commitment to honoring the dedicated service of our law enforcement, LLU has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Punjab Police.**

**- **Eligibility:** This scholarship provides special fee concessions exclusively to the children and wards of serving or retired Punjab Police personnel.**

**- **Purpose:** To support the families of those who work tirelessly to maintain peace and security in our province.**
